desc: a `type: Function, default: () => {}` prop default is the noop-function VALUE, not a mutable-literal factory to invoke: only array/object-literal-body arrows (`() => []` / `() => ({…})`) are invoked. Pre-fix React/Solid/Svelte invoked it (`(() => {})()` → void) so `props.onPick` typed `void | ((…)=>any)` (TS2322/TS2345); Vue/Angular/Lit were already correct — all 6 now agree
